threshold_event: Baseline hold state: no new threshold-changing evidence
current_safe_clause: Table 1E stays a source-depth and claim-ceiling panel; `research_integrity` remains locally non-empty but zero-seed in Figure 2 / Table 2.
clause_if_event_lands: No clause upgrade; reuse the existing bounded wording and keep the package count-silent.
surfaces_that_must_not_change_yet: Figure 2 / Table 2 seeded-denominator prose and any cross-publisher or second-family rhetoric.
paper_thesis_use: Provides one exact no-change rule so manuscript/dashboard/thesis users do not rewrite shard-008 prose after denominator-neutral churn.
caution: Do not treat more route replays, blocked-page checks, or same-family packaging as a clause-changing event.

threshold_event: One direct Finnish police, court, ministry, or judicial-process document confirms the broadcaster-described phenomenon or official response
current_safe_clause: Finland is a bounded direct-source-resolved multilingual comparator below official phenomenon confirmation.
clause_if_event_lands: Upgrade only the procedural-side clause: Table 1E may say the package now spans one Italian document-grade anchor plus one second institution-confirmed Finnish procedural companion, while keeping the broader package framed as source-depth architecture rather than prevalence.
surfaces_that_must_not_change_yet: Research-integrity zero-seed denominator language, seed-promotion rhetoric, and cross-publisher notice claims.
paper_thesis_use: Gives the paper/thesis layer one exact sentence switch for the strongest procedural-side threshold without reopening unrelated research-integrity prose.
caution: Do not rewrite Finland as a court-system prevalence signal or as a general legal-process confirmation beyond the captured official document.

threshold_event: One non-Springer direct journal, publisher, platform, or institutional notice text lands for an existing research-integrity row
current_safe_clause: The direct-notice slice has venue-type breadth across Springer journal-article and book surfaces, but remains publisher-concentrated and does not change Figure 2 / Table 2.
clause_if_event_lands: Upgrade only the top-depth clause: Table 1E may say the direct-notice slice is no longer publisher-family-concentrated at top depth; it may also say this reopens the seed-admission decision, but not that the category has already moved out of zero-seed state.
surfaces_that_must_not_change_yet: Figure 2 / Table 2 denominator claims, seeded-count language, and any statement implying a mature research-integrity corpus.
paper_thesis_use: Separates top-depth notice diversification from denominator change for manuscript, reviewer-response, and thesis wording.
caution: Do not count DOI pairs, blocked redirects, specialist summaries, or same-family duplication as this event.

threshold_event: One case-specific research-integrity row is explicitly admitted into the shared seeded spine
current_safe_clause: `research_integrity` is locally non-empty in Table 1E but remains zero-seed in Figure 2 / Table 2.
clause_if_event_lands: Upgrade the denominator clause: one row may now be described as a seeded research-integrity exemplar, while the rest of the shadow package remains mixed and should stay separate from the seeded denominator story.
surfaces_that_must_not_change_yet: Any wording that promotes the whole research-integrity shadow package at once, plus residual-floor or top-depth claims not actually supported by the admitted row.
paper_thesis_use: Gives one exact switch for the only event that should change Figure 2 / Table 2 seeded-denominator prose.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Figure 2 zero-seed sidecar retirement or narrowing ; category-readiness badge
caution: Do not flatten one admitted row into cross-publisher maturity, misconduct proof, or full-category seeded closure.

threshold_event: A second direct platform-action, publisher-action, indexer-action, or institutional-action record hardens the residual floor
current_safe_clause: The residual floor is mixed: one archived SSRN platform-action exemplar plus two still-weak residual rows.
clause_if_event_lands: Upgrade only the residual-floor clause: Table 1E may say the residual floor is no longer singular at action-record depth, while keeping the bucket quarantined and separate from top-depth and seed-admission claims.
surfaces_that_must_not_change_yet: Procedural-side authority claims, top-depth publisher-diversity rhetoric, and Figure 2 / Table 2 seeded-denominator language.
paper_thesis_use: Lets methods/results and limitations prose acknowledge residual-floor improvement without overpromoting it.
caution: Do not present residual hardening as equivalent to direct-notice depth or seed admission.

threshold_event: False progress: blocked NEJM/SAGE replays, metadata-only churn, or more Springer-adjacent packaging without a threshold change
current_safe_clause: The package already has enough local packaging to support reviewer-safe prose, so repeated route churn changes no claim ceiling.
clause_if_event_lands: No clause upgrade; explicitly freeze wording and route users back to the existing canonical fragment and threshold bridge.
surfaces_that_must_not_change_yet: All shared claims, preprint, article-architecture, and caption surfaces.
paper_thesis_use: Creates one machine-readable anti-churn gate for future cycles and downstream manuscript reuse.
caution: Do not spend another prose-only cycle on these routes unless a real threshold state changes or a shared consumer drifts.
